case_title: KHADIJAH GHAFUR VS. WALT DISNEY COMPANY/ABC NEWS, INC. AND AFFILIATES et al (Provide Access)

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY, AMERICAN BROADCASTING COMPANIES, INC, KGO TELEVISION, INC, KFSN TELEVISION, LLC, MOTION 1) TO REQUIRE GHAFUR TO POST SECURITY AS A CONDITION OF PROCEEDING, OR, ALTERNATIVELY; 2) TO DECLARE GHAFUR A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND REQUIRE HER TO POST SECURITY AS A CONDITION OF PROCEEDING. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT CASE NUMBER EC050452. PLAINTIFF MUST POST A SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000 ON OR BEFORE APRIL 13, 2010 AS A CONDITION OF PROCEEDING WITH THIS LAWSUIT IN SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT CASE NUMBER CGC-09-493222. IF SECURITY IS NOT TIMELY POSTED, THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED. THIS CASE IS STAYED UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-16-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Specially Appearing Defts The Walt Disney Company Et Al: 1) To Require Ghafure To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding, Or, Alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur A Vexatious Litigant And Require Her To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY, AMERICAN BROADCASTING COMPANIES, INC., KGO TELEVISION, INC., KFSN TELEVISION, LLC, Motion By Specially Appearing Defendants The Walt Disney Company et al, 1) To Require Ghafur to Post Security as a Condition of Proceeding, or, alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur a Vexatious Litigant and Require Her to Post Security as a Condition of Proceeding. Appearances: Terry P. Anatassiou, Esq. of RMKB (415) 543-4800 appearing for Defendants and Moving party; Khadijah Ghafur, Plaintiff in Pro Per, appearing telephonically and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Plaintiff has been declared a vexatious litigant in Los Angeles County Superior Court Case Number EC050452. Plaintiff must post a security in the amount of $10,000 on or before April 13, 2010 as a condition of proceeding with this lawsuit in San Francisco Superior Court Case Number CGC-09-493222. If security is not timely posted, this action will be dismissed. This case is stayed until further Order of the Court. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Apr-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Specially Appearing Defts The Walt Disney Company Et Al: 1) To Require Ghafure To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding, Or, Alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur A Vexatious Litigant And Require Her To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Continued To Mar-16-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY, AMERICAN BROADCASTING COMPANIES, INC., KGO TELEVISION, INC., KFSN TELEVISION, LLC, Motion By Specially Appearing Defendants The Walt Disney Company, et al: 1) To Require Ghafure to Post Security as a Condition Of Proceeding, or, Alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur a Vexatious Litigant and Require Her to Post Security as a Condition of Proceeding. Appearances: Terry P. Anastassiou, Esq. of RMKB (415) 543-4800 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Hearing held. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Matter continued March 16, 2010; stay remains in effect. (The court continues the matter because the court was unable to set up the telephonic appearance for Plaintiff for today's hearing date.) Defendant to give notice to plaintiff of new hearing date. (Defense counsel to prepare Order regarding today's ruling and Order granting the continuance of the Stay.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
